title: Boys' Brigade 34th Singapore Company — Target Test
topic: Boys' Brigade History, Values, Traditions, Uniform, Ranks and Company Life
chatContext:
Students are preparing for the BB 34th Singapore Company Target Test. Here is all the lesson material they need to know:

--- WILLIAM ALEXANDER SMITH ---
Sir William Alexander Smith founded the Boys' Brigade. He was born on 27th October 1854 in Scotland. He founded the BB on 4th October 1883 at Free College Mission Hall, North Woodside, Glasgow, Scotland. He was a Sunday school teacher who wanted to maintain order among unruly boys using religion and discipline.

--- BB STORY ---
The Boys' Brigade was founded in 1883. It was the first uniform group for youth in the world.

The BB in Singapore was started by James Milner Fraser (a member of the 23rd Aberdeen Company who came to Singapore as an architect). Together with SGT Quek Eng Moh, they founded the 1st Singapore Company at Prinsep Street Presbyterian Centre on 12th January 1930.

--- BB VESPER ---
Great God who knowest all our needs,
Bless Thou our watch and guard our sleep;
Forgive our sins of thoughts and deed,
And in Thy peace Thy servants keep.

We thank Thee for the day that's done,
We trust Thee for the days to be;
Thy love we learn in Christ Thy Son,
O may we all His glory see!

--- BB TABLE GRACE ---
Be present at our table Lord
Be here and everywhere adored
These mercies bless and grant that we
May feast in fellowship with Thee

--- BB VALUES ---
Motto: 'Sure and Steadfast' (from Hebrews 6:19)
Emblem: Anchor and Red Cross

BB Object: 'The advancement of Christ's Kingdom among Boys and the promotion of habits of Obedience, Reverence, Discipline, Self-Respect and all that tends towards a true Christian Manliness.'

--- UNIFORM ---
The 5 types of uniforms:
1. Day Dress (Full Uniform)
2. Ceremonial Dress
3. Musketry Kit (Half Uniform)
4. Fatigue Dress
5. PT Kit

For a Private (PTE), PT Kit consists of:
1. Blue BB T-shirt
2. Name tag
3. Dark blue shorts
4. White socks
5. Running shoes

--- RANKS ---
The 5 NCO (Non-Commissioned Officer) ranks from lowest to highest:
1. Lance Corporal (LCP)
2. Corporal (CPL)
3. Sergeant (SGT)
4. Staff Sergeant (SSG)
5. Warrant Officer (WO)

CSM = Company Sergeant Major (the most senior NCO in a company).

Post-secondary BB program = Primers Program.
Primers Program ranks by years of service:
a. Cadet Lieutenant (1st year)
b. Senior Cadet Lieutenant (subsequent years)

BB Officers ranks (according to their level of training):
a. Officer Cadet
b. 2nd Lieutenant
c. Lieutenant

sections.title: William Alexander Smith
sections.content:
**Sir William Alexander Smith** is the founder of the Boys' Brigade.

- **Born:** 27th October 1854 in **Scotland**
- **Founded the BB:** 4th October 1883
- **Where:** Free College Mission Hall, North Woodside, Glasgow, Scotland

He was a Sunday school teacher who wanted to maintain order among unruly boys using **religion and discipline**.

keyFacts.label: Founded BB at
keyFacts.value: Free College Mission Hall, North Woodside, Glasgow, Scotland

sections.title: The Boys' Brigade Story
sections.content:
The Boys' Brigade was **founded in 1883** — it was the first uniform group for youth in the world.

**BB in Singapore:**
The BB in Singapore was started by **James Milner Fraser** (a member of the 23rd Aberdeen Company who came to Singapore as an architect), together with SGT Quek Eng Moh.

They founded the **1st Singapore Company** at **Prinsep Street Presbyterian Centre** on **12th January 1930**.

keyFacts.label: Started BB in Singapore
keyFacts.value: James Milner Fraser (+ SGT Quek Eng Moh)

sections.title: BB Vesper & Table Grace
sections.content:
**BB Vesper** (sung at the end of every BB gathering):

> Great God who knowest all our needs,
> Bless Thou our watch and guard our sleep;
> Forgive our sins of thoughts and deed,
> And in Thy peace Thy servants keep.
> 
> We thank Thee for the day that's done,
> We trust Thee for the days to be;
> Thy love we learn in Christ Thy Son,
> O may we all His glory see!

**BB Table Grace** (sung before each meal):

> Be present at our table Lord
> Be here and everywhere adored
> These mercies bless and grant that we
> May feast in fellowship with Thee

keyFacts.label: BB Vesper
keyFacts.value: Sung at the END of a BB gathering

keyFacts.label: Vesper starts with
keyFacts.value: Great God who knowest all our needs...

keyFacts.label: Table Grace starts with
keyFacts.value: Be present at our table Lord...

sections.title: BB Values, Motto & Emblem
sections.content:
**Motto:** *'Sure and Steadfast'*
**Source:** Hebrews 6:19

**Emblem:** Anchor and Red Cross

**BB Object:**
*'The advancement of **Christ's** Kingdom among **Boys** and the promotion of **habits** of **Obedience**, **Reverence**, **Discipline**, **Self-Respect** and all that tends towards a true **Christian** Manliness.'*

keyFacts.label: BB Object (key words)
keyFacts.value: Christ's Kingdom, Boys, habits of Obedience, Reverence, Discipline, Self-Respect, Christian Manliness

sections.title: Uniform & Dress Codes
sections.content:
**The 5 Types of Uniforms:**
1. Day Dress (Full Uniform)
2. Ceremonial Dress
3. Musketry Kit (Half Uniform)
4. Fatigue Dress
5. PT Kit

**PT Kit for a Private (PTE) consists of:**
1. Blue BB T-shirt
2. Name tag
3. Dark blue shorts
4. White socks
5. Running shoes

keyFacts.label: PT Kit items (PTE)
keyFacts.value: Blue BB T-shirt, Name tag, Dark blue shorts, White socks, Running shoes

sections.title: NCO & Officer Ranks
sections.content:
**NCO = Non-Commissioned Officer**

**The 5 NCO Ranks** (lowest to highest):
1. Lance Corporal (LCP)
2. Corporal (CPL)
3. Sergeant (SGT)
4. Staff Sergeant (SSG)
5. Warrant Officer (WO)

**CSM = Company Sergeant Major** — the most senior NCO role in a company.

**Post-Secondary BB Program = Primers Program**
Ranks in Primers Program:
a. Cadet Lieutenant (1st year)
b. Senior Cadet Lieutenant (subsequent years)

**BB Officers Ranks** (by level of training):
a. Officer Cadet
b. 2nd Lieutenant
c. Lieutenant

questions.question: Who started The Boys' Brigade?
When was the founder of The Boys' Brigade born?
Where was the founder of The Boys' Brigade born?
When was The Boys' Brigade founded?
Who started The Boys' Brigade in Singapore?
When was The Boys' Brigade in Singapore founded?
Where was The Boys' Brigade in Singapore founded?
Write out the BB Vesper in full. (10 marks)
Write out the BB Table Grace in full. (10 marks)
Write down the BB Motto (2m) and BB Emblem (2m). (4 marks)
What Bible verse was the BB motto taken from? (2 marks)
Write out the BB Object in full. (15 marks)
Name the 5 types of uniforms available in The Boys' Brigade. (5 marks)
For a Private (PTE), what does the PT Kit consist of? List all 5 items. (5 marks)
Name all 5 NCO ranks in The Boys' Brigade from lowest to highest. (20 marks)
What is the post-secondary BB program known as? (2 marks)
What ranks do Primers Program members hold? Give both rank levels (a and b). (4 marks)
Name the 3 BB Officers ranks according to their level of training. (6 marks)
What does the acronym NCO stand for? (2 marks)
What does the acronym CSM stand for? (2 marks)
